vocab.example: We could upsell you to a plan with unlimited storage.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có thể bán thêm cho anh/chị gói lưu trữ không giới hạn.

vocab.meaning_vi: bán chéo sản phẩm/dịch vụ khác
vocab.example: We could also cross-sell our training package along with it.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi cũng có thể bán chéo gói đào tạo kèm theo.

vocab.example: Let me prepare a bundle with an add-on for extra users.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi chuẩn bị một gói combo kèm thêm tùy chọn cho người dùng bổ sung.

vocab.example: I think you might benefit from our premium plan.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi nghĩ anh/chị sẽ được lợi khi dùng gói cao cấp của chúng tôi.

vocab.example: Would you like to add on the analytics module?
vocab.example_vi: Anh/chị có muốn thêm mô-đun phân tích không?

vocab.example: Since you're an existing customer, I can offer you a discount.
vocab.example_vi: Vì anh/chị là khách hàng hiện tại, tôi có thể tặng một khoản giảm giá.

vocab.example: Based on your usage pattern, you might need more storage.
vocab.example_vi: Dựa trên thói quen sử dụng, anh/chị có thể cần thêm dung lượng lưu trữ.

vocab.example: Let me put together a tailored offer just for you.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi chuẩn bị một ưu đãi phù hợp riêng cho anh/chị.

listening.title: Offering more to a current customer

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Hi Ms. Huong, I noticed you've been using our basic plan for six months now.

lines.speaker: Huong (customer)
lines.text: Yes, it's been working well for our team.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: That's great to hear. Based on your usage pattern, you might benefit from our premium plan.

lines.speaker: Huong (customer)
lines.text: What extra features does it include?

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: It includes priority support, and we could also upsell you to unlimited storage.

lines.speaker: Huong (customer)
lines.text: That sounds useful. Is there anything else you'd recommend?

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Yes, we could cross-sell our training package along with it.

lines.speaker: Huong (customer)
lines.text: Interesting. Can you bundle everything into one offer?

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Of course, I'll prepare a bundle with an add-on for extra users too.

lines.speaker: Huong (customer)
lines.text: Perfect. Since we're an existing customer, is there any discount?

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Absolutely, let me put together a tailored offer just for you.

questions.q: What does Nam recommend based on Huong's usage pattern?
What does Nam offer to cross-sell?
What will Nam prepare for Huong?

shadowing: Based on your usage pattern, you might benefit from our premium plan.
We could upsell you to a plan with unlimited storage.
We could also cross-sell our training package along with it.
Let me prepare a bundle with an add-on for extra users.
Since you're an existing customer, I can offer you a tailored deal.
